name: lovable-openclaw
description: lovable-openclaw — a macOS bootstrap CLI for Lovable. Installs, configures, and verifies a complete development environment in one command.

name: OpenAnt
description: OpenAnt from Knostic is an open source LLM-based vulnerability discovery product that helps defenders proactively find verified security flaws while minimizing both false positives and false negatives. Stage 1 detects. Stage 2 attacks. What survives is real.

name: binance-skills-hub
description: Binance Skills Hub is an open skills marketplace that gives AI agents native access to crypto

name: openclaw-kapso-whatsapp
description: Give your OpenClaw AI agent a WhatsApp number. Official Meta Cloud API via Kapso. No ban risk.

name: full-stack
description: full-stack Next.js 16 + React 19 template with Auth, Supabase, Stripe/Alipay, Resend. Powers [SnapVee](https://snapvee.com), [SkillHub](https://skillforge.cc/), [Meshivo 3D](https://meshivo.com/) and more.

name: antigravity-superpowers
description: Bring Superpowers workflows to Antigravity — brainstorming, planning, TDD, code review, and verification skills ported as close to the original as possible.
